674 GG0170K2_WLK_150_BYGOAL_CD GG0170K2_WLK_150_BYGOAL_CD GG0170K2 Mobility: Goal to Walk 150 Feet by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to ambulate at least 150 feet in a corridor or similar space by the end of the SNF PPS
